questions.q: According to research announced on April 27, 2026, the University of Nebraska–Lincoln developed a highly effective vaccine against H5N1 bird flu specifically designed to protect what animals following a 2024 interspecies outbreak?
A BMJ Group study featured on April 27, 2026, tracking over 100,000 individuals for three decades, found that which specific change to an exercise routine significantly lowers the risk of death?

On April 27, 2026, the Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA) published a study in Nature Communications showing that after birth, the brain's hippocampal neural network transitions from what state?
options: Dense and random to sparser and refined
Sparser and refined to dense and random
questions.correctText: Dense and random to sparser and refined

questions.q: On April 27, 2026, Intellia Therapeutics reported topline data from its Phase 3 HAELO clinical trial. This milestone marks the world's first Phase 3 readout for what type of candidate?
options: An in vivo CRISPR gene editing candidate
questions.correctText: An in vivo CRISPR gene editing candidate
